flow_points: Zimbabwe started strong, scoring 47/0 in the Powerplay at RR 7.83.
BJ Bennett anchored Zimbabwe's innings, contributing 37.9% of their runs.
Australia's chase immediately faltered, losing 4 wickets for 38 runs in the Powerplay.
B Muzarabani delivered a crucial spell, taking 4 wickets for 19 runs from 4 overs.
MT Renshaw anchored Australia's innings with 65(46), contributing 44.5% of their total.
B Evans provided key support with a spell of 3 wickets for 23 runs from 3.3 overs.
Australia struggled under extreme chase pressure, leading to a late-innings collapse.
